courseleaf.title: Art History, Master of Arts
courseleaf.informationtext:
Graduate Study

The Program in Art History offers studies leading to the Master of Arts degree in History of Art as preparation for further graduate study or professional work. For more information, contact the Graduate Staff Advisor at 530-752-8710, or see Art History.

Degree Requirements 

See Art History.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: Would you like to know more about the visual arts and their history, prepare for careers in museums or galleries, or conduct research in the history of art?  The M. A. in Art History prepares students for these and other opportunities.  We offer a globally oriented exposure to art history, with courses in Asian, Latin American, and Middle Eastern art, in addition to the arts of Europe and the United States.
